---
title: 'Start Here |  About'
date: '2016-06-05T21:48:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_type: 'PAGE'
blogger_blog: 'Cornerstone Restaurants'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_page_id: '4288917102302006062'
blogger_filename: '/p/start-here-about.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Cornerstone Restaurants/feed.atom'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cr-logo3-f535155e8462.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="316" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/cr-logo3-b3f20417e93d.jpg" width="320" /></a></div>
<br /><h3>
Cornerstone Restaurants</h3>
<br />We are family friendly restaurant concepts.&nbsp;<h4>
We are committed to:</h4>
<ul>
<li><b>Excellence</b></li>
<ul>
<li>No half way, good enough, here. If we're going to do it, we want it to be the best.</li>
</ul>
<li><b>Family</b></li>
<ul>
<li>Family is key to any great society. As such, we will create environments that cater to, nurture, and feed families. Kids are not only welcome in our restaurants, they are a large part of the reason we exist.</li>
</ul>
<li><b>Alcohol Free Environments</b></li>
<ul>
<li>Alcohol is not evil, but our family has a history of drug and alcohol abuse. We know how hard it is for our fellow sober friends to keep their sobriety, especially in the early days.&nbsp;</li>
<li>As a continuation to that theme, we create restaurants that are not only Family Friendly, but Sobriety Friendly too.</li>
</ul>
<li><b>Healthy-Ish</b></li>
<ul>
<li>Let's be honest, good tasting food is not always good for you. Food that is good for you, doesn't always taste good. We want to provide a little of both, and let you decide. But for those who want to eat right, we want to provide great tasting options, so that you can enjoy being healthy!</li>
</ul>
</ul>
<div>
<br /></div>
<h4>
We are more than one restaurant:</h4>
<div>
We want to launch, directly or via support, chains of various concepts across the nation (and world). We don't have all of the good ideas, but we may be able to support those who do.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
As such, we will periodically assist someone else's vision, and help them launch. We don't want to tie them up with a mess of red tape, so we will keep our "ownership" small, and re-evaluate that ownership percentage at each stage.&nbsp;</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
Our current concepts in development are:</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<ul>
<li><b>The Soda Shop</b></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>A Coffee Shop: Coffee Bean &amp; Tea Leaf Franchise (or something else?)</b></li>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>The Final Frontier (A space and sci fi theme)</b></li>
</ul>
</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
More to come... Darrell</div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<br /></div>
<div>
<span style="font-size: x-small;">*A Wolfe Family Conceptions business.</span></div>
